Building AI that solves real problems

I'm a third-year Computer Science student at GL Bajaj Institute with a strong foundation in data structures, backend development, and machine learning. I love building systems that are both technically sound and genuinely useful.

From developing ML pipelines for financial fraud detection to AI-optimized railway routing engines, I focus on creating real-world impact through intelligent technology.

Software Development Intern at SoftPro India, Joint Secretary of Rotaract Club, and Emerging Leader 2024 awardee.

Projects

Featured Work

🛡️
Jan 2026 – Feb 2026
AI-Based Financial Threat Monitoring System
↗
⟶ How it works

Ingests raw transaction data → runs feature engineering (amount normalisation, time-delta encoding, merchant-category vectorisation) → feeds into a dual-model pipeline. A Random Forest classifier flags known fraud patterns while Isolation Forest catches novel anomalies without labels. Each transaction receives a composite risk score; high-risk entries surface on a Streamlit dashboard with SHAP-based explanations so analysts understand why a transaction was flagged — not just that it was.

PythonScikit-learnPandasStreamlitIsolation ForestRandom Forest
🚂
Jul 2025 – Present
Chanakya — Railway Routing AI
↗
⟶ How it works

Models the rail network as a weighted directed graph. A custom AI scheduler ingests live train positions, platform availability, and historical delay data, then applies modified Dijkstra + greedy rescheduling to recompute optimal paths in real time. The system predicts downstream cascade delays and proactively re-routes trains before conflicts arise — cutting simulated delays by 65% and boosting throughput by 18%. Station masters get a live ops dashboard; loco pilots receive advisory updates.

PythonAI/MLDistributed SystemsReal-time Dashboards
🏥
Aug 2025 – Dec 2025
ArogyaNest — Health Platform
↗
⟶ How it works

Multi-role health platform (patients, doctors, admins) with JWT-protected routes and structured MySQL schema. Patient vitals are logged continuously; an anomaly detection model monitors readings and fires alerts when values drift outside personalised baselines. A knowledge engine cross-references symptoms against a 140+ remedy library to surface treatment suggestions. Analytics dashboards give doctors aggregate trend views while patients track their own health timeline — all within a single MERN-adjacent stack.

MySQLJavaScriptAI AnalyticsNode.js
